pi_items.source: Task-specific synthetic test data. Referenced in setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py as the expected clinic name to be created during task execution.
Task-specific synthetic test data. Referenced in setup_task.sh (line 44), export_result.sh (line 25), and verifier.py (line 56). No real-world verification available as this is test data.

Real city name. Toronto, Ontario is the actual location used for this demo environment, configured in setup_oscar.sh (SSL certificate subject line 59) and oscar.properties timezone (line 14: 'America/Toronto').
Verified in oscar.properties line 68: 'billregion=ON' (Ontario). Ontario is a real Canadian province, and this environment is configured for Ontario billing.
Fictional test number. 416 is the real Toronto area code, but 555 is a reserved fictional phone exchange per Wikipedia's article on 555 telephone numbers. Used for testing in task scenario.
Fictional test number. 416 is the real Toronto area code, but 555 is a reserved fictional phone exchange. Used for testing in task scenario.

Docker health check (docker-compose.yml line 44) uses 'login.do'. Setup script launches Firefox with 'login.jsp' (lines 295, 325, 347). Both endpoints exist; login.jsp is the JSP page, login.do is the servlet mapping.
Verified in setup_oscar.sh (lines 217, 373) and docker-compose.yml database user configuration (line 12: MYSQL_USER). This is the standard demo admin account for OSCAR EMR.

Verified in setup_oscar.sh (lines 210, 374) and docker-compose.yml (line 13: MYSQL_PASSWORD, line 26 in oscar.properties: db_password). The password hash '45-179-551441115-117798-30877213-3052-6889-30-60' is used in database (line 210).
Verified in setup_oscar.sh (lines 217, 375). Standard demo PIN for oscardoc account in OSCAR EMR demo environments.

privileged_info_summary: OSCAR EMR is a real, open-source electronic health record system from Canada. This task operates in a synthetic Docker demo environment configured for Ontario (ON). The test clinic details (West End Clinic, 880 West Drive, Toronto) are synthetic test data created for task completion verification. All contact numbers use the fictional 555 phone exchange (416-555-XXXX format) and should not be dialed. The environment uses standard demo credentials (oscardoc/oscar/PIN 1117) configured in docker-compose.yml and setup_oscar.sh. The OSCAR application runs on localhost:8080 and is accessed via either /oscar/login.jsp or /oscar/login.do endpoints.
